debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
⊢ ‖GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.S poly pbar ε pc‖ *
      nth_partial 2 (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu pbar ε poly pc) pbar.innerParams =
    inner ℝ (pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.S poly pbar ε pc)))
      (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

proof:
have hS := pc.norm_S_ne_zero
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu, rotproj_inner_unit]
  have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams := by fun_prop
  rw [show rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ • rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w from by
    ext; simp [rotproj_inner_unit, rotproj_inner, div_eq_inv_mul, smul_eq_mul]]
  rw [(hf.hasFDerivAt.const_smul ‖pc.S‖⁻¹).fderiv]
  simp [rotproj_inner', HasFDerivAt.rotproj_inner pbar pc.S pc.w |>.fderiv, Fin.isValue]
  field_simp [hS.symm]
failed_attempts:
have hS := pc.norm_S_ne_zero
  have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams :=

  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu]
  rw [show pc.fu = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ • rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w by
    ext; simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu, rotproj_inner_unit, rotproj_inner, div_eq_inv_mul]]
  rw [(hf.hasFDerivAt.const_smul ‖pc.S‖⁻¹).fderiv, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_smul', Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
  rw [HasFDerivAt.rotproj_inner pbar pc.S pc.w |>.fderiv]
  simp [rotproj_inner', Fin.isValue]
  field_simp [hS.symm]

have hS := pc.norm_S_ne_zero
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu]
  have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams :=
    (Differentiable.rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w).differentiableAt
  rw [show pc.fu = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ • (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) by ext; simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu, rotproj_inner_unit, smul_eq_mul, inv_mul_eq_div],
      (hf.hasFDerivAt.const_smul ‖pc.S‖⁻¹).fderiv]
  simp [rotproj_inner']
  field_simp [hS]

    (Differentiable.rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w).differentiableAt
  rw [show (λ x ↦ rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x / ‖pc.S‖) = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ • rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w from rfl]
  rw [(hf.hasFDerivAt.const_smul ‖pc.S‖⁻¹).fderiv, HasFDerivAt.rotproj_inner pbar pc.S pc.w |>.fderiv]

  simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.coe_smul', Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, Fin.isValue]

  rw [show (λ x ↦ rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x / ‖pc.S‖) = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ • rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w from

  have : fderiv ℝ (λ x ↦ rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x / ‖pc.S‖) pbar.innerParams = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ • rotproj_inner' pbar pc.S pc.w := by
    rw [show (λ x ↦ rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x / ‖pc.S‖) = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ • rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w by ext; simp [div_eq_inv_mul]]
    exact (hf.const_smul ‖pc.S‖⁻¹).fderiv
  rw [this, ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]

have hf_unit : (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) =

    unfold rotproj_inner_unit
    convert_to (fderiv ℝ (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ • rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) = _
    · ext; simp [rotproj_inner, inv_mul_eq_div]
    have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams := by fun_prop
    rw [(hf.hasFDerivAt.const_smul ‖pc.S‖⁻¹).fderiv, HasFDerivAt.rotproj_inner pbar pc.S pc.w |>.fderiv]
    simp [rotproj_inner', Fin.isValue]
  have := pc.norm_S_ne_zero

have := pc.norm_S_ne_zero
